function scene(nr::Int, nc::Int)
    #= none:3 =#
    #= none:4 =#
    vals = Vector{Float64}(undef, nr * nc)
    #= none:5 =#
    ci = (nr + 1) / 2
    #= none:6 =#
    cj = (nc + 1) / 2
    #= none:7 =#
    for i = 1:nr, j = 1:nc
        #= none:8 =#
        di = i - ci
        #= none:9 =#
        dj = j - cj
        #= none:10 =#
        dist = sqrt(di * di + dj * dj)
        #= none:11 =#
        rings = 0.5 + 0.5 * cos(dist * 0.8)
        #= none:12 =#
        grad = (i + j) / (nr + nc)
        #= none:13 =#
        v = 0.55rings + 0.45grad
        #= none:15 =#
        if i >= 12 && (i <= 24 && (j >= 12 && j <= 24))
            #= none:16 =#
            v = 0.95
        end
        #= none:18 =#
        if i >= 44 && (i <= 60 && (j >= 46 && j <= 62))
            #= none:19 =#
            v = 0.1
        end
        #= none:21 =#
        v < 0.0 && (v = 0.0)
        #= none:22 =#
        v > 1.0 && (v = 1.0)
        #= none:23 =#
        vals[j + (nr - i) * nc] = v
        #= none:24 =#
    end
    #= none:25 =#
    return vals
end

function pixel_at(vals::Vector{Float64}, nr::Int, nc::Int, i::Int, j::Int)
    #= none:2 =#
    #= none:3 =#
    ii = i
    #= none:4 =#
    jj = j
    #= none:5 =#
    ii < 1 && (ii = 1)
    #= none:6 =#
    ii > nr && (ii = nr)
    #= none:7 =#
    jj < 1 && (jj = 1)
    #= none:8 =#
    jj > nc && (jj = nc)
    #= none:9 =#
    return vals[jj + (nr - ii) * nc]
end

function calc_pH(v_Base_added::Float64, pKa::Float64, c0_Acid::Float64, v0_Acid::Float64, c0_Base::Float64)
    #= none:2 =#
    #= none:4 =#
    Ka = 10.0 ^ -pKa
    #= none:5 =#
    pKb = 14.0 - pKa
    #= none:6 =#
    Kb = 10.0 ^ -pKb
    #= none:8 =#
    if pKa <= 1.74
        #= none:9 =#
        c_H = 0.0
        #= none:10 =#
        if v_Base_added * c0_Base <= v0_Acid * c0_Acid
            #= none:11 =#
            c_H = (c0_Acid * v0_Acid - c0_Base * v_Base_added) / (v0_Acid + v_Base_added) + 1.0e-7
        else
            #= none:13 =#
            c_OH = (c0_Base * v_Base_added - c0_Acid * v0_Acid) / (v0_Acid + v_Base_added)
            #= none:14 =#
            c_H = 1.0e-14 / c_OH
        end
        #= none:16 =#
        return -(log(10.0, c_H))
    else
        #= none:19 =#
        c0_H = -Ka / 2.0 + sqrt((Ka * Ka) / 4.0 + Ka * c0_Acid)
        #= none:20 =#
        c0_OH = -Kb / 2.0 + sqrt((Kb * Kb) / 4.0 + Kb * c0_Acid)
        #= none:22 =#
        n_acid = (c0_Acid - c0_H) * v0_Acid
        #= none:23 =#
        n_base = c0_Base * v_Base_added
        #= none:25 =#
        if v_Base_added == 0.0
            #= none:26 =#
            return -(log(10.0, c0_H))
        elseif #= none:27 =# n_acid > n_base
            #= none:28 =#
            c_H = Ka * ((c0_Acid * v0_Acid) / (c0_H * v0_Acid + c0_Base * v_Base_added) - 1.0)
            #= none:29 =#
            return -(log(10.0, c_H))
        else
            #= none:31 =#
            c_OH = (c0_Base * v_Base_added - n_acid) / (v0_Acid + v_Base_added) + c0_OH
            #= none:32 =#
            c_H = 1.0e-14 / c_OH
            #= none:33 =#
            return -(log(10.0, c_H))
        end
    end
end

function equivalence_volume(pKa::Float64, c0_Acid::Float64, v0_Acid::Float64, c0_Base::Float64)
    #= none:2 =#
    #= none:3 =#
    if pKa <= 1.74
        #= none:4 =#
        return (c0_Acid * v0_Acid) / c0_Base
    else
        #= none:6 =#
        Ka = 10.0 ^ -pKa
        #= none:7 =#
        c0_H = -Ka / 2.0 + sqrt((Ka * Ka) / 4.0 + Ka * c0_Acid)
        #= none:8 =#
        return ((c0_Acid - c0_H) * v0_Acid) / c0_Base
    end
end
